sections.heading: ( 1) These Regulations may be cited as the Constitutional Titie and
sections.text:
( 1) These Regulations may be cited as the Constitutional Titie and
Offices Emoluments Regulations, 2018. Commence­
ment
(2) These Regulations are deemed to have come into operation
on 1 st January, 2018.

sections.heading: These shall be paid to the holder of an office specified in Salary
sections.text:
These shall be paid to the holder of an office specified in Salary
the First Column of the Schedule a salarv at the annual rate
prescribed for that office in the Second Volume of the Schedule.

sections.heading: The Constitutional Officers Emoluments Regulations, 2012 Revocation
sections.text:
The Constitutional Officers Emoluments Regulations, 2012 Revocation
ofS.I. 66 of
are revoked.
